moments.label: FOUNDATION
moments.meaning: Three diamond foundations establish the mansion as one inhabitable logo-form.

moments.label: HABITATION
moments.meaning: Rooms, bridges, courtyards, and disclosure boundaries become navigable living space.

moments.label: MEMORY
moments.meaning: Committed cinematic matter moves through windows, pools, and the central memory atrium.

moments.label: CONTINUUM
moments.meaning: Chronofold separates four architectural states while Rootprint preserves one identity.

slbit.summary: A navigable mansion derived from the three interlocking TESSARYN diamonds, with temporal rooms, committed material memory, and one verified World Cell identity.
statements: The mansion footprint is authored from the three interlocking TESSARYN diamond frames.
The sage, teal, and terracotta wings remain distinct while sharing one central atrium.
The cinematic payload drives material state and light but never supplies geometry.
Four Moments expose foundation, habitation, memory, and continuum states.
World Cell identity commits the mansion descriptor and every cinematic media chunk.
Power House binds PHA identity, Rootprint replay, and a portable Memory Capsule.
